tagline: AI-powered CX helpdesk that automates support and drives sales

pricingIntel.summary: Starts at $300/mo (annual) for 2,000 tickets/month on the Pro plan
details: Pro: $300/mo for 2,000 tickets ($36/100 overage). most popular
AI Agent add-on: $0.90 per resolved conversation
costDrivers: Ticket volume. pricing jumps at 300, 2k, and 5k tickets/month thresholds
AI Agent usage. $0.90 per automated resolution adds up at scale
Channel add-ons. Voice and SMS are optional extras on top of the base plan

benefits.label: Support ticket automation
benefits.description: AI resolves routine inquiries (order status, returns, shipping) without a human agent, cutting your CX labor cost.

ticketRate.label: % of orders that generate a support ticket
ticketRate.source: industry avg (Gorgias benchmark: 4-8% depending on category)

costPerTicket.label: Fully loaded cost per support ticket (labor + tooling)

automationRate.label: % of tickets resolved by AI without human intervention

benefits.label: Sales conversion from AI shopping assistant
benefits.description: Proactive chat engages browsing visitors with tailored product recommendations, converting browsers into buyers.

chatEngagementRate.label: % of visitors who engage with chat

incrementalConversionRate.label: % of chat-engaged visitors who convert incrementally
incrementalConversionRate.source: dtcmvp estimate (Gorgias claims 2.5x conversion for chatters. we model 2% incremental, conservatively)

sources: Gorgias claims: 'resolving 60% of support inquiries' (AI agent)
Gorgias claims: 'increases conversions 2.5x with tailored recommendations'

narrative.headline: Gorgias could save {brandName} {costSavingsTotal}/yr in support costs and add {revenueTotal}/yr in sales.

byDepartment.CX / Support: For {contactName} on the CX team: Gorgias automates the repetitive tickets (order status, shipping, returns) so your agents focus on high-value conversations. The {costSavingsTotal}/yr in ticket deflection comes from AI handling what your team currently does manually.
byDepartment.Ecommerce / DTC: For {contactName} on the ecom side: Gorgias is both a cost play and a revenue play. The AI shopping assistant turns your chat widget into a sales channel, adding {revenueTotal}/yr in conversions from visitors who would have bounced without it.
byDepartment.Marketing / Growth: For {contactName} and the marketing team: the shopping assistant side of Gorgias drives {revenueTotal}/yr by converting browsing visitors through tailored product recommendations in chat. Think of it as a conversion rate optimizer that also handles support.
byDepartment.Finance / Accounting: For {contactName} reviewing the budget: at {targetMultiple} target ROI, {brandName} should pay no more than {maxMonthly}/mo for a CX platform. Gorgias delivers value through two channels: {costSavingsTotal}/yr in labor savings and {revenueTotal}/yr in AI-assisted sales.
byDepartment.Founder & CEO: For {contactName}: Gorgias adds {totalValue}/yr to {brandName} across support automation ({costSavingsTotal}/yr saved) and AI sales ({revenueTotal}/yr added). At your {targetMultiple} target, the ceiling is {maxMonthly}/mo.
byDepartment.Other: Gorgias adds {totalValue}/yr to {brandName} by automating support tickets and converting visitors through AI-powered chat recommendations.

byCategory.Apparel & Fashion: Apparel brands generate more CX tickets than most categories (sizing questions, order edits, return inquiries). {brandName}'s ticket volume is likely on the higher end of our estimate, which means the automation savings could be even larger than {costSavingsTotal}/yr.
byCategory.Beauty & Cosmetics: Beauty brands see strong chat engagement because shoppers want product recommendations (routines, shade matching). The AI shopping assistant conversion lift tends to outperform other categories for {brandName}.
byCategory.Food & Drink: Food and beverage brands have high order frequency but lower AOV, which means ticket volume scales fast. Automation savings at {brandName}'s scale are significant because even small per-ticket costs compound quickly.
byCategory.Other: These numbers use industry-wide benchmarks for ticket rates and support costs. {brandName}'s actual ticket volume may push the savings higher or lower depending on your product complexity.

notes: Gorgias has their own published ROI calculator. Tier 1 upgrade opportunity. Pricing is per-ticket and scales significantly with volume. A 250k-order brand generating ~1,000 tickets/month fits the Pro plan; higher-volume brands jump to Advanced or Enterprise.
